sub_strands.sub_strand: Digital Media Literacy and Oral Communication
outcomes: Listen attentively to multi-media educational narratives to accurately summarize foundational arguments
Present brief oral reports on environmental or localized topics using varied vocabulary and accurate syntactic forms
Analyze elementary digital and print media texts to answer explicit and implicit interpretive prompts
Read age-appropriate literary texts silently to establish central thematic messages and chronological structural elements
Compose multi-paragraph descriptive and narrative configurations utilizing correct grammatical inflections
Apply structured punctuation matrices including quotation marks and commas in complex sentence environments
Kusikiliza kwa makini habari au simulizi za kidijitali na kuzitolea muhtasari sahihi
Kuzungumza kwa ufasaha na kutumia msamiati mwafaka kueleza mada za kijamii na mazingira
Kusoma vifungu vya habari na fasihi ya watoto ili kujibu maswali ya wazi na ya kiufahamu
Kutambua sifa za wahusika na maadili yanayojitokeza katika hadithi
Kuandika insha fupi za wasifu na masimulizi zikizingatia uakifishaji na tahajia sahihi
Kutumia viambishi, ngeli za nomino, na nyakati kwa usahihi katika tungo
Read, write, and identify place value parameters for whole numbers up to 10,000
Round off whole numbers to the nearest tens, hundreds, and thousands
Compare and order proper fractions with denominators up to 10 using concrete grids
Convert simple fractions into base-10 decimal equivalents with one decimal place
Add and subtract whole numbers up to 4 digits with regrouping parameters up to a total of 10,000
Multiply a 3-digit number by a 1-digit number and divide 2-digit numbers by 1-digit divisors without remainders
Convert length metrics between meters and centimeters utilizing accurate computational models
Solve real-world addition and subtraction problems involving kilograms, grams, liters, and milliliters
Tell time down to minutes and seconds using both digital systems and traditional analogue interfaces
Perform compound transactions involving currency combinations up to 1,000 Kenyan Shillings
Identify and classify right angles, acute angles, parallel lines, and perpendicular configurations
Collect localized environmental data metrics and represent them accurately using standardized pictographs
Classify local area plants based on characteristics such as flowering status and root frameworks
Differentiate between vertebrate and invertebrate structures utilizing physical specimens and digital models
Identify, label, and outline the physiological functions of the human digestive system structures
Differentiate types of human teeth, mapping their specific structural traits to mechanical functionality
Differentiate the impacts of air, water, and soil pollution in the community and offer remedial designs
Navigate basic digital simulation components to observe environmental processes safely

sub_strands.sub_strand: States of Matter and Sound Energy
outcomes: Investigate properties of solids, liquids, and gases via localized physical experiments
Demonstrate how sound travels through different materials and describe factors altering pitch
Construct small-scale macro-structures like simple terraces or mulching beds to curb soil degradation
Demonstrate climate-smart micro-irrigation and simple water harvesting methodologies in farming modules
Establish functional container gardens or innovative vertical farm structures for local vegetable crops
Practice proper food safety protocols, kitchen sorting, and basic macro-nutritional preservation steps
Map local county boundaries and identify dominant geographic landmarks using the 8 points of the compass
Outline the historical significance of localized heritage infrastructure and built monuments
Describe historical migration paths and trace inter-community relationships within the county environment
Identify structural functions of county leadership frameworks and outline characteristics of ethical civic administration
Design structural patterns and 3D mockups using sustainable artistic practices and digital illustration panels
Produce functional household items using traditional pottery modeling and basic leather crafting techniques
Compose and perform short topical ensemble melodies utilizing localized scale configurations
Execute complex choreographic steps or rhythmic gymnastics balances that align with designated tempos
Evaluate scriptural passages regarding fair resource distribution, community empathy, and social justice parameters
Differentiate ethical choices from deceptive behaviors within digital communication pipelines and physical encounters
